title: Bitter Creamy Midnight Cardamom Stir-fry
description: A Korean-inspired dish featuring a creamy and bitter sauce with cardamom, perfect for midnight cravings. Dairy-free and suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: Almond milk
ingredients.notes: heated to 400F/205C and mixed with cardamom powder until smooth

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and onion. Sauté for about 1 minute, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Pour in the tomato paste and stir-fry for another minute until fragrant and darkened slightly.
Add water, soy sauce (and optional low sodium version), cardamom powder, and pepper. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in almond milk and nutritional yeast if using. Allow it to thicken into a creamy consistency as you stir.
Remove from heat once the mixture is thickened enough for stirring without clumping. Season with additional salt or pepper if needed.
Serve immediately over steamed vegetables, rice, or noodles.
